name: FlightReady MD - FAA Medical Exam Preparation
concept: AI copilot for FAA medical exam preparation. Ingests pilot medical history, medications, and conditions to generate pre-AME exam reports identifying potential deferral issues and required documentation.
target_market: Commercial pilots seeking First/Second Class medical (60K pilots)

practice_blocking_urgency.impact: Commercial pilots lose $15K-60K income during 45-180 day deferral resolution

ai_advantage: Medication cross-reference: LLM checks all medications against FAA disallowed list (constantly updated)
Condition documentation generator: Creates AME-specific documentation packets for common conditions
Deferral risk score: ML predicts likelihood of medical deferral based on condition/medication profile
AME selection: Recommends AMEs with experience handling specific conditions
competitive_advantage: Database of 50,000+ real AME exam outcomes
Condition-specific success rate data by AME
primary_risks: Deferral prediction accuracy (legal liability if wrong)
sources: FAA Guide for Aviation Medical Examiners
